name: model-picker
title: Model Picker
author: d3serve Labs
description: Compact shadcn-style model picker with app-owned models, optional search, optional suggestions, reasoning, plan mode, and fast mode.

meta.aiSdk: Vercel AI SDK model IDs are exposed through integrations.aiSdk and resolveModelPickerSelection.
meta.motion: This baseline item does not install motion. Install model-picker-animated for Motion-powered layout and width animations.

docs: Installed files are source-owned by your app. Pass the models you want in the picker, use createModelPickerModel/defineModelPickerModels for typed model lists, use resolveModelPickerSelection for Vercel AI SDK route handlers, and opt into enableModelSearch/showSuggestedModels when your model list grows. The core UI composes shadcn dropdown-menu and tooltip registry dependencies so Base UI and Radix projects keep their chosen primitive stack. This install is the non-animated baseline; use model-picker-animated if you want Motion layout and width animations.
